scripts.dev: concurrently -n FRONTEND,BACKEND -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w shared && npm run clean -w backend && npm run clean -w frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
